creator: johan@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

Do you have any other consol window open 
when you try to start xconsole? 

I start a console xterm from my .xinitrc 
and to be able to start xconsole I have  
to close the xterm first. 

Please make sure that you do not have any  
other consol window open.
